company.name: Brito Mobiles
company.location: Shop No. 75, Buntungwa Street, Opposite Ukupopoka Grocery, Kabwe, Zambia

products.name: Tecno Camon 50 Pro
products.description: Powerful camera phone with premium design and smooth performance.
products.fullDescription: The Tecno Camon 50 Pro features a high-resolution camera system, large AMOLED display, fast charging, and powerful processor. Perfect for photography lovers and everyday users who want premium features at an affordable price.

products.name: Infinix Hot 60i
products.description: Great value smartphone with big battery and fast charging.
products.fullDescription: Infinix Hot 60i comes with a massive battery, fast charging support, vibrant display, and decent camera setup. Ideal for students and users who need reliable performance on a budget.

products.name: Tecno Spark 20
products.description: Reliable Tecno smartphone with good camera and performance.
products.fullDescription: Tecno Spark 20 offers excellent battery life, smooth performance, and a beautiful design. Great choice for daily use, social media, and light gaming.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy A15
products.description: Popular Samsung phone with excellent display and software support.
products.fullDescription: Samsung Galaxy A15 features a superb Super AMOLED display, long software update support, reliable cameras, and solid build quality. One of the best mid-range phones available.

products.name: Affordable Feature Phone
products.description: Basic phone for calls, SMS and long battery life.
products.fullDescription: Simple and durable feature phone perfect for elderly users or as a secondary phone. Long battery life and easy to use.

products.name: Lenovo IdeaPad Laptop
products.description: Budget laptop suitable for students and basic work.
products.fullDescription: Lenovo IdeaPad offers good performance for everyday tasks like browsing, Microsoft Office, online classes, and light multimedia. Reliable and affordable.

products.name: Dell Inspiron 14
products.description: Powerful everyday laptop with good battery life.
products.fullDescription: Dell Inspiron 14 is a versatile laptop with excellent build quality, comfortable keyboard, and strong performance for work and study.

products.name: Phone Accessories Pack
products.description: Charger, earphones, case and screen protector combo.
products.fullDescription: Complete accessory bundle including fast charger, wired earphones, protective case and tempered glass screen protector.

staff.name: Madam Nizza Dorcus
staff.quote: Quality and honesty is what we stand for. Every product is carefully selected to fit our customers' budget and needs.

staff.name: John Banda
staff.quote: We help our customers find the perfect phone or laptop that matches their needs and budget.

staff.name: Trisha Mwanza
staff.quote: Our goal is to make every customer happy with their purchase and provide excellent after-sales support.
